steps.t: Adamanda North-took can be found in Nobottle. You should look for Adamanda North-took.
The wall is located west of Tighfield, in Yondershire. Diamond has asked you to meet her by the wall west of Tighfield.
The wall is located west of Tighfield. Diamond has asked you to help her patrol the wall for anything suspicious.
The wall is located west of Tighfield. You should continue patrolling the wall.
The wall is located west of Tighfield. You should continue patrolling the wall.
Diamond is waiting for you by the wall west of Tighfield. You should let Diamond know about the Men you defeated.
